readiness.title: Application Readiness
readiness.desc_strong: Excellent! You have most documents ready. Final review recommended.
readiness.desc_moderate: Good progress. Check remaining required items before applying.
readiness.desc_weak: Complete more required documents to strengthen your application.
ai.welcome: I'm your VisaClear AI assistant. I'm here to answer questions about your {{visaType}} visa application to {{destination}}. What would you like to know?
ai.demo_answer: Demo answer — not generated by AI: For a real {{destination}} {{visaType}} visa application, our AI gives a personalised answer based on your actual checklist progress. Sign up for a free account to ask real questions about your own application.
ai.error_generic: Sorry, I could not process that request. Please try again.
ai.feedback_thanks_down: Thanks for letting us know. We review all feedback to improve accuracy.
ai.quick_q1: What bank balance do I need?
ai.quick_q2: How far in advance should I apply?
ai.quick_q3: What is the most common rejection reason?
ai.disclaimer_rest: AI responses are for guidance only. Always verify requirements with the official embassy or consulate before submitting your application.
ai.free_title: AI Visa Assistant is a Pro feature
ai.free_desc: Upgrade to Pro for 10 AI questions a month, or Expert for unlimited.
ai.limit_reached_desc: Upgrade to Expert for unlimited AI Visa Assistant questions.
selector.title: Your Visa Checklist
selector.subtitle: Answer three questions. Receive your complete document guide instantly.
selector.step1_desc: Search and select your country of origin
selector.step2_label: 2. Where do you want to go?
selector.step3_desc: What is the reason for your travel?
selector.complete_fields: Complete all three fields above to continue
selector.privacy_rest: We collect no personal data at this stage.
selector.upgrade_toast: Upgrade to Pro to access all 24+ destinations.
nav.ai_pro_feature_toast: AI Assistant is a Pro feature. Upgrade to unlock.
readiness_card.title: Application Readiness Score
readiness_card.desc: Score is based on {{checked}} of {{total}} documents checked. Required items carry more weight than optional ones.
share.title: Share Checklist Link
share.subtitle: For visa agents · Pre-filled for your client
share.desc: Copy a unique link that opens this exact checklist pre-filled for your client. Send it via WhatsApp, email, or any channel.
share.toast_success: Shareable link copied! Send it to your client.
pdf.title: Download Checklist
pdf.subtitle: Premium PDF · Print-ready
pdf.desc: Professionally formatted PDF with your progress, approval tips, and all document requirements.
pdf.toast_failed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
pdf.upgrade_toast: PDF export is a Pro feature. Upgrade to download.
bank.title: Bank Letter Template
bank.subtitle: Sample · Take to your bank
bank.desc: Official-style template your bank or employer can use to write your financial support letter.
bank.toast_failed: Failed to generate bank letter. Please try again.
bank.how_to_title: How to use the Bank Letter Template
bank.how_to_2: Take it to your bank or employer
bank.how_to_3: Ask them to reproduce it on official letterhead
bank.how_to_4: Ensure it is stamped, signed, and dated by an authorised officer
bank.how_to_5: Submit the official version with your visa application
ask_ai_button.title: Ask VisaClear AI
ask_ai_button.desc: Get instant answers about your {{destination}} {{visaType}} visa application
success_tip.title: Top Approval Tip
disclaimer.text: This checklist is a guidance tool only and does not constitute legal or immigration advice. Requirements change regularly — always verify with the official embassy or consulate website before submitting your application.
items_section.title: Document Checklist
completion.title: You're ready to apply!
completion.desc: All required documents are gathered. Here are your next steps to submit a strong application.
action_cards.apply_desc: Go directly to the official embassy or immigration portal to start your application.
action_cards.find_agent_desc: For complex or high-stakes applications, a verified agent dramatically reduces rejection risk.
action_cards.save_desc: Save this checklist to your dashboard, get deadline reminders, and pick up where you left off.
action_cards.toast_save_failed: Failed to save. Please try again.
action_cards.demo_toast_saved: Checklist saved! (Demo Account) — visit My Trips on your dashboard to see saved checklists.
action_cards.pro_desc: AI rejection analyser, PDF export, deadline alerts, unlimited checklists, and priority support.
roadmap.title: Application Roadmap
roadmap.step1_desc: Check for expired dates, missing stamps, and name spelling errors.
roadmap.step2_title: Confirm requirements on official embassy site
roadmap.step2_desc: Rules change. Always verify before submitting.
roadmap.step3_title: Book your biometric or interview appointment
roadmap.step3_desc: Slots fill fast — book as early as possible.
roadmap.step4_desc: Apply online or in person at the embassy / VAC.
roadmap.step5_desc: Use your reference number at the embassy's tracking portal.
referral.title: Know someone applying for the same visa?
referral.desc: Share this exact checklist with them. One click — they arrive with everything pre-filled.
unlock.title: Take Your Application Further
unlock.subtitle: Upgrade to VisaClear Pro for the complete toolkit.
unlock.f1_desc: Understand exactly why applications fail and fix yours before submitting
unlock.f2_desc: AI-powered photo compliance check against embassy standards
unlock.f3_desc: Download branded checklists and bank letter templates anytime
unlock.f4_desc: Never miss a biometric appointment or document expiry
unlock.f5_desc: Send pre-filled checklists to clients with one link
not_available.title: Checklist not available yet
not_available.desc: We do not have data for this combination yet. We are expanding our database regularly.
footer.copyright: VisaClear is a guidance tool, not legal advice.
